news-global-econ.title: Job Openings Rise, Layoffs Fall as Labor Demand Firms
news-global-econ.description:
U.S. job openings rose in January while layoffs declined and workers continued to quit jobs at a steady pace, pointing to firm labor demand even as hiring remained restrained.

news-global-econ.description:
Chen Wei, a deputy to China’s rubber-stamp National People’s Congress, on Wednesday suggested teaching mandatory sex ed classes to kindergarten children in a desperate effort to shore up China’s collapsing birthrates.

news-global-econ.title: Democrat Rep Josh Riley blasted as 'hypocrite' over ties to energy firm he criticizes on campaign trail
news-global-econ.description: A competitive House race in upstate New York heats up as Republican Peter Oberacker attacks Democrat Josh Riley over his ties to a utility company.
